8-Person Private Home with Free Parking & Low Traffic

analysis.rewritten_desc: Sleep 8 comfortably in this spacious private home, perfect for group stays or family vacations. With free on-site parking included, you can relax knowing you won't need to worry about local traffic or parking fees. Located just outside the city's congestion charging zone (CA Zone), this entire home rental offers privacy and convenience for travelers seeking easy access to nearby attractions. While our listing is still new, we're always available to ensure your stay is seamless. Ideal for groups wanting space to spread out, this property features [insert key spaces like living areas/kitchen/etc once details are confirmed] with capacity for four guests. Note: Parking is free and available on-site for all guests vehicles.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Exterior facade should be cover photo to showcase street view and parking access, as curb appeal is critical at this premium price point (£425/night vs median £175).
